prompt: The inner class cannot access the enclosing instance's method. What is the bug?
choices: Nested classes cannot access private members of the enclosing class
A static nested class has no implicit reference to the enclosing instance; it cannot access instance members like message directly
message must be declared public for the nested class to access it
Static nested classes cannot define instance methods
explanation: Static nested classes are like top-level classes that happen to be nested — they have no implicit 'this' reference to the outer class. Accessing the instance field message requires an explicit enclosing instance. Fix: either remove static from the nested class (making it an inner class), or pass the message as a constructor parameter.
